content: NVIDIA Container Toolkit: prerequisite for GPU passthrough in Docker. Install on Ubuntu: add NVIDIA GPG key + apt repo, then apt install nvidia-container-toolkit. Configure with: sudo nvidia-ctk runtime configure --runtime=docker && sudo systemctl restart docker. Docker Compose GPU config uses deploy.resources.reservations.devices with driver:nvidia, count:1, capabilities:[gpu]. Detection check: nvidia-smi command availability is the key signal. If toolkit not installed, docker compose up fails on ollama with error about driver not found.
